title: Analytics v2 enforcement strictness default
context: issue #279 analytics-v2 adds an analytics_strictness knob (off|warn|strict) modeled on rule_compliance.mode. Choosing the shipped default. Analytics is coding-first and must never block a correct build by default.

options.label: warn — 🟡 at completion, never blocks (coding-first, strict opt-in)
off — total silence unless opted in
strict — blocks on Done by default

rationale: Haider chose warn via AskUserQuestion 2026-07-02: analytics never blocks a correct build; strict stays opt-in and is never auto-escalated.
